text:
阳光，微风吹拂青草，波光粼粼地水面，带给人很舒服的感觉，跟塞尔达画面似的，之所以让人舒服，可能是这种环境更适合生存，有安全感，这种生机勃勃的样子。

夕阳西下，暮色将至，可能意味着危险的来临，人心中的感情可能会带有恐惧和警惕。
text_en:
Sunlight, a breeze through the grass, a glittering surface of water — it feels comfortable, like a scene from Zelda. Maybe it feels that way because such a place is good for survival: safe, and full of life.

When the sun sets and dusk comes on, danger may be coming too. Perhaps that is why the feeling carries a trace of fear and vigilance.

text: 当你难过时，只是过去的你的经历和认知没有办法帮你解决现在的新问题了；而这同时也就意味着，你已经走到自己旧世界的边缘。恭喜你，即将踏入新世界。
text_en: When you feel sad, it only means your past experience and understanding can no longer solve the new problem in front of you. It also means you have reached the edge of your old world. Congratulations — you are about to step into a new one.

text: 综合几个信源：绩效考评的结果因素有很多，有时是出于保护团队其他人，不得不把差的考评打到某个人身上。怎么理性看待就很重要——不要因为领导打了差绩效就自我否定。自己最近几次考评不差，但也要引以为戒。
text_en: From several sources: many factors shape a performance review. Sometimes, to protect the rest of the team, a bad rating has to land on someone. Seeing this rationally matters — do not deny yourself over one bad rating from your manager. My own recent reviews have been fine, but I take this as a warning.

text: 坐船游湖吹风。看路灯照向桥洞，灯光洒在湖面上。
text_en: Took a boat on the lake, feeling the wind. Watched the street lamps shine into the bridge arch, their light scattered over the water.

text: 2014 年 1 月 25 日，湖北武汉，李娜曾经的教练余丽桥带着学徒们在电视机前见证李娜澳网夺冠。第二排右一为郑钦文。十年后，她在巴黎奥运会拿下了女单金牌。
text_en: January 25, 2014, Wuhan: Yu Liqiao, Li Na's former coach, gathered her students in front of the TV to watch Li Na win the Australian Open. First from the right in the second row is Zheng Qinwen. Ten years later, she won the women's singles gold at the Paris Olympics.

text:
巴黎奥运开幕，我却重新看了一遍 2008 北京奥运会的开幕式——当年没有太看懂它的意义。

14 年前已经是很遥远的过去了。08 年我和玮哥听着许嵩，在实验学校的天桥上来来往往，争论着、期待着 23 vs 24。偶尔也会想，哪一天挣脱了学生身份，好像就能成为一个有闲的中产，体面地、自由地干很多有意思的事情。

2008 年是一个有希望、有憧憬的时代，自己甚至想抢在时间前面奔跑。我记得我当时很能跳，也很喜欢跳。我也很喜欢奔跑起来，风从耳边和身边穿过。初中的一场篮球赛，我接到抢断的球，踩着风快攻上篮，那短短几秒，我的世界里只容得下风和我自己。

现在，玮哥回家当了公务员，我没有成为想象中的有闲中产，是一个忙碌的大厂打工人。勒布朗作为美国男篮第一位篮球旗手，伫立在巴黎的游轮船头，手握国旗，算是人生照片了。而 24 随着一场坠机事故，永远离开了这个世界。他曾在北京奥运开幕式独享 10 秒特写；现在，在巴黎美国男篮住的酒店入口，科比作为精神符号立在那里——那个 silence 的手势，正是北京奥运会时的镜头。

俱往矣。人事万千，穿身而过，自己不要忘了继续奔跑。run。
text_en:
The Paris Olympics opened, but I went back and rewatched the 2008 Beijing opening ceremony — back then I did not really understand what it meant.

Fourteen years ago is already a distant past. In 2008, Wei and I listened to Xu Song and crossed the footbridge at the experimental school again and again, arguing and dreaming about 23 vs 24. Sometimes I thought that once I shed my student identity, I could become a leisurely middle-class man, doing interesting things with dignity and freedom.

2008 was a time of hope and longing; I even wanted to run ahead of time itself. I remember I could jump, and I loved jumping. I loved running too, the wind passing my ears and my sides. In one middle-school basketball game, I caught a steal and rode the wind on a fast break — for those few seconds, my world held only the wind and me.

Now Wei has gone home to be a civil servant, and I never became the leisurely middle-class man I imagined — I am a busy worker at a big company. LeBron, the first basketball player to carry the flag for Team USA, stood at the bow of the boat in Paris holding the flag — a photo of a lifetime. And 24 left this world forever in a crash. He once had a ten-second close-up at the Beijing opening ceremony; now, at the entrance of the hotel where Team USA stays in Paris, Kobe stands as a spiritual symbol — that "silence" gesture, the very shot from Beijing.

All gone. A thousand things pass through a life. May I not forget to keep running. run.

text: 大嘴联合与辉同行做了一场直播。从直播氛围上讲，没有对谈的感觉；但抛开内容可以看一件事：公司在向新的营销方式靠近，2C 行业需要跟消费者靠得更近。合作对象的人设也很重要——选的是「知识改变命运」的董宇辉，而不是搞笑风格的小杨哥。
text_en: Dazui did a joint livestream with Time with Yuhui. As a conversation, the atmosphere was not quite there. But beyond the content, one thing is clear: the company is moving toward new ways of marketing — a consumer business needs to get closer to its consumers. The partner's persona matters too: they chose Dong Yuhui, who stands for "knowledge changes destiny," not the comedian Xiaoyangge.

text: 上班路上遇到一群穿红领白身短袖、参加 NEO 培训的年轻同事。看着他们脸上洋溢的轻松和憧憬，很是羡慕——那也是两年前的自己啊，眼里充满希望，心里踌躇满志。
text_en: On the way to work I passed a group of young colleagues in white tees with red collars, heading to NEO training. The ease and hope on their faces made me envious — that was me two years ago, eyes full of hope, heart full of ambition.

text: 在黑夜里的你，拥有看不见的世界，和清晰的自己。
text_en: In the dark of night, you own an invisible world, and a clear self.

text: 年中绩效伙伴评议，里头门道挺深：呈现什么、不呈现什么，跟竞争策略强相关。关键是做好了什么，而不是做了什么。
text_en: The mid-year peer review has more depth than it looks: what you show and what you leave out is tied closely to your competitive strategy. The key is what you did well, not what you did.

text: 「再颠簸的生活，也要闪亮地过。」——《我的阿勒泰》
text_en: "However bumpy the life, live it brightly." — To the Wonder (My Altay)
The sky is most beautiful in the moment before dark.

text: 「我很想你快点回来，但是花还没有开。」——许知远表哥
text_en: "I wish you would come back soon — but the flowers have not opened yet." — Xu Zhiyuan's cousin

text: 2024 年巴菲特股东大会，巴菲特下意识叫了一声芒格。真叫人恍惚，也叫人唏嘘。
text_en: At the 2024 Berkshire shareholders meeting, Buffett reflexively called out "Munger." It makes you drift for a moment, and sigh.

text: 看《很高兴认识你》，许知远回到苏北老家，成了村里的热搜对象。他的小姨不愿意他们来，她说因为她太穷了。许知远语塞了，想说些什么又止住——他知道上位者的安慰是没有说服力的，哪怕他是真心的。穷人说自己穷，富人没有资格说穷点没关系，说了就是「何不食肉糜」。
text_en: Watching "Nice to Meet You": Xu Zhiyuan returns to his hometown in northern Jiangsu and becomes the village's trending topic. His aunt did not want them to come, she said, because she is too poor. Xu fell silent, started to speak, then stopped — he knew that comfort from someone above carries no weight, even when sincere. When the poor say they are poor, the rich have no right to say being poor is fine; say it, and it becomes "why don't they eat meat porridge?"

text: 听「半拿铁」的苹果简史系列。五期，每期两个半小时，听起来毫不费劲——两位主播一唱一和，节奏很好。他们以事件为主线、时间为顺序，讲苹果这家公司的发展史，也讲它的创始人怎么面对人生、创造产品、改变行业。乔布斯不是完人：性格里有矛盾，对员工苛刻，对产品极致，在道德标准上甚至差得很远，但他深深地影响了世界。keep looking, don't settle；think different；connect the dots，这些观念我很受用。致敬苹果，致敬乔布斯。
text_en: Listening to the "Half Latte" podcast series on Apple's history. Five episodes, two and a half hours each, and they go down easily — the two hosts play off each other with a great rhythm. They follow events in time order: how Apple grew, and how its founders faced life, built products, and changed the industry. Jobs was no saint: a contradictory character, hard on his employees, extreme about products, and far from any moral ideal — but he shaped the world deeply. keep looking, don't settle; think different; connect the dots — these ideas serve me well. Hats off to Apple, and to Jobs.

text: 在得物买了一件 T 恤，物流发了两个相同的包裹，连取件码都一样。心想岂不是可以收下一件、退掉一件，相当于 0 元购。但实际上没有这么干。
text_en: Bought a T-shirt on Dewu. Logistics sent two identical packages, with the same pickup code. I thought: couldn't I keep one and return the other — a free shirt, in effect. But I didn't do it.

text: 乔布斯去世当天，皮克斯公司天空中出现一道彩虹。
text_en: On the day Jobs died, a rainbow appeared in the sky above Pixar.
image_alt: 皮克斯公司上空的彩虹

text:
现在可以说是我上学以来最自由的阶段。课几乎可以随意翘，时间归自己支配；每个月有一千多的助学金，加上一万块奖学金，谈不上财富自由，但想吃什么可以随便买。教研室配着中央空调、双屏台式机、冰箱、打印机和 wifi，同门之间每天欢声笑语。

小富即安的心态让人懈怠。每天睡到日上三竿，到了教研室打开电脑，再刷刷手机，时间就偷偷溜走了。郭老师忙于研究院，无暇管我们，教研室渐渐肆无忌惮：游戏、打牌、看直播，都在蔓延生长。只有被抓到一次，或者临近考试，大家才收敛些。

我不打游戏，但也有耗时间的活动——看看剧或者综艺，搞一会篆刻。一学期之间，去了趟上海，去了趟常州。

一学期接近尾声才发现，对于我等，没有任务分配，真的较难自律。
text_en:
This is probably the freest stretch since I started school. Classes can be skipped at will; my time is my own. Each month there is a stipend of over a thousand yuan, plus a ten-thousand scholarship — not financial freedom, but I can buy whatever I want to eat. The lab has central air-conditioning, dual-monitor desktops, a fridge, a printer, and wifi, and my labmates laugh all day.

Small comforts breed slack. I sleep late, open the computer at the lab, glance at my phone, and the time slips away. Professor Guo is busy with the research institute and has no time to watch us, so the lab grows unbridled: games, cards, livestreams, all spreading. Only when someone gets caught, or when exams approach, do we pull ourselves together.

I don't play games, but I have my own time-killers — dramas and variety shows, and a bout of seal carving. In one semester I made a trip to Shanghai and one to Changzhou.

Only near the end of the semester did I see it clearly: for people like me, without assigned tasks, self-discipline is truly hard.
